blocks.content: 1. Navigate to Schedules tab and click New.

children.alt: Click the New button on the Schedules tab

blocks.content: 2. Fill in Schedule Details and click Save.

children.alt: New Schedule form with cron expression and target Executable/Pipeline

blocks.title: See also
blocks.content: Guidance on managing scheduled jobs: [Schedule Job Management](/recipes/general/schedule-job-management).
